body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Investigate NaNs that appear rapidly (in first month)

We like the flexibility of reading initial conditions from a net cdf file and interpolation to the model grid, because it lets us use any model grid.

However, this can lead to unphysical initial states, and it requires a somewhat complex set of steps (now in the initial condition function).

**_In the future, we should save both the interpolated state diagnostic as well as the field vector itself_**
## To-do


## Content
We now do the following to make sure the IC are "stable/physical" for soil.
- theta_l > theta_r
- theta_l < \nu
- theta_i < nu- \theta_l
- temperature < max(T_atmos)
- temperature > min(T_atmos)

title: try with better IC
